data.overview: UK M&E quantities follow NRM2 (RICS, current standard) or SMM7 (legacy, still widely used). Both define how each service type is measured, what unit to use, and what is included in the rate vs measured separately.

pipework.classification: By nominal bore (NB) in mm and material
pipework.method: Measure along centreline of pipe, through fittings
pipework.in_rate: Jointing of straight runs, basic clips, making good, testing, waste/cutting
pipework.measured_separately: Named valves and accessories, fittings (bends/tees/reducers), fire stopping, BWIC, insulation

ductwork_rectangular.classification: By gauge (mm) per DW/144 pressure class
ductwork_rectangular.note: Higher pressure classes require one gauge step heavier. Fittings measured separately in m² of surface area.

cables.classification: By type, voltage rating, cores × CSA
cables.terminations: Enumerated (nr) — cable glands at each end

equipment.classification: By type, manufacturer/model or performance spec, duty, capacity

insulation.pipework: Linear metres (m) by bore size, material type, thickness, finish

nrm2_principles: Measurement is NET IN PLACE — no waste allowance in measured quantities (waste is in the rate)
Work is deemed to include all labours unless stated otherwise
Items include fixing, jointing, and testing unless otherwise stated
Provisional sums for items that cannot be fully defined
BWIC (builders work in connection) measured separately — holes, chases, sleeves, fire stopping

key_references.NRM2: RICS New Rules of Measurement 2 (2012/2013) — current standard
key_references.SMM7: Standard Method of Measurement 7th Edition (1988/1998) — legacy, still used
key_references.DW144: BESA Specification for Sheet Metal Ductwork (2016) — ductwork gauge/classification
key_references.DW172: BESA Specification for Kitchen Ventilation Systems (2018) — 30-50% premium over standard
key_references.BS7671: IET Wiring Regulations 18th Edition (2022) — electrical installation requirements
key_references.BS5422: Thermal insulation of pipes and ductwork — thickness tables
